description: Local invariants that capture what the skill expects from the AdonisJS v7 upstream surface. scripts/check_upstream.mjs asserts every positive fingerprint is present at least once in SKILL.md, references/**/*.md, and references/patterns/**/*.md, and that every anti-pattern is absent from the same files. MAINTENANCE.md documents how to update this file during a quarterly Context7 sync.

positive_fingerprints.why: v7 exposes controllers through #generated/controllers barrel by PascalCase resource name, not with a Controller suffix.
v7 canonical root schema helper. v6 used vine.compile(vine.object(...)) which is now an anti-pattern.
Controllers must validate via request.validateUsing(validator), never via request.all() or request.only().
v7 shared-props middleware must extend BaseInertiaMiddleware from @adonisjs/inertia/inertia_middleware.
Browser-facing Inertia apps keep CSRF XSRF cookie enabled.
@adonisjs/inertia/react Link and Form use the routeParams prop in v7, never params.
Mandatory v7 hook: generates #generated/controllers and enables transformer types.
v7 config/inertia.ts top-level option. v6 used history.encrypt which is now an anti-pattern.
Canonical v7 scaffold command. v6 used npm init adonisjs@latest which still resolves but is not the documented form.
Official v7 package for background job processing.

anti_patterns.why: Old barrel shape. #generated/controllers exposes PascalCase resource names without the Controller suffix in v7.
v6 form. v7 uses vine.create(...) as the root schema.
v6-style Link/Form prop. v7 uses routeParams={{ ... }}.
v6 config/inertia.ts option. v7 renamed it to top-level encryptHistory.
v6 config/inertia.ts shared-props field. v7 moves this into an InertiaMiddleware that extends BaseInertiaMiddleware.
v6 scaffold form. v7 documents npm create adonisjs@latest.
The --kit=api starter is a flat AdonisJS app, not a Turborepo monorepo. The monorepo layout only ships with the optional --kit=api-monorepo variant which is out of scope for this skill.
Same as above: the flat --kit=api template does not use an apps/backend workspace.
